questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a stem-and-leaf plot in analyzing temperature changes?

options.B: To show the distribution of temperatures

questions.question: A stem-and-leaf plot shows the daily rainfall in a city. If the stem is $20$ and the leaves are $5, 7, 2$, what are the actual rainfall values?
Which of the following distributions is best represented by a stem-and-leaf plot?
The stem-and-leaf plot below shows the temperature changes in a region. What is the median temperature change? $\begin{array}{r|l} 1 & 2, 5, 8 \ 2 & 1, 4, 7 end{array}$
What is the advantage of using a stem-and-leaf plot over a histogram?

options.C: It is better for large datasets
options.D: It is more difficult to create
options.E: It is only used for temperature changes

questions.question: A researcher collected data on the amount of $CO_2$ in the atmosphere. The stem-and-leaf plot shows the following data: $\begin{array}{r|l} 3 & 4, 9, 1 \ 4 & 2, 6, 8 end{array}$. What is the range of $CO_2$ levels?
The stem-and-leaf plot shows the pH levels of different ecosystems. Which ecosystem has the highest pH level? $\begin{array}{r|l} 6 & 2, 5, 8 \ 7 & 1, 4, 7 end{array}$
Which of the following is a limitation of using a stem-and-leaf plot?

options.A: It can only be used for small datasets
options.B: It can only be used for large datasets
options.C: It does not show the distribution of the data
options.D: It is difficult to compare multiple datasets
options.E: It is only used for temperature changes

questions.question: Create a stem-and-leaf plot to display the following rainfall data: $23, 27, 19, 31, 22, 28, 25$. What can you infer about the distribution of rainfall from the plot?

The stem-and-leaf plot shows the temperature changes in a region over a month. $\begin{array}{r|l} 1 & 2, 5, 8 \ 2 & 1, 4, 7 end{array}$. Calculate the mean and median temperature changes. What can you infer about the distribution of temperature changes?

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Remind students to check their work carefully
Tip 2: Encourage students to use the stem-and-leaf plot to identify patterns and trends
Tip 3: Suggest that students use a calculator to check their calculations
